question: In the Gospel of John’s opening lines, what is said about how creation happened in relation to the Word?

choices.A: All things were made through him
choices.B: He was made after the angels
choices.C: He created only spiritual things, not physical things
choices.D: He was present only after creation finished

teaching.title: The Word and creation
teaching.body: John’s prologue states that “all things were made through him,” referring to the Word.
